titleStmt.title: SII 37.505: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 505. (A.R. No. B 5 of 1943-44.) Nandavaram, Banganapalle Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Left pillar in the mukha-maṇḍapa of the Chauḍēśvari temple.
This is dated Śaka 1475 Khara, Māgha ba. 12. Irregular.

Damaged. It refers to certain honours and concessions granted to the 360 Ekāngavīras who were the devotees of the goddess Chauḍēśvari during the time of the pontiff Vīra-Śānta bhikshāvṛitti-ayya of Śrīśailaṁ to the grant of some varttana by the former to Chākila Nippamma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka
varuṣaṁbbulu 1475 Agunanēṭi khara saṁvatsara māgha
ba 12 lu Akkiṁceṁnnamaseṭṭi konamuṭaṁ pāpiśeṭi modala
yina togaṭakulaṁ muṁnūṭa Aruvai yēkāṁgi vīrulū
cākila nippaṁmaku vrāyiṁci yiccina dharmaśāsanakramameṭlaṁ
nanu śrīśailamaṁdu śrīvīraśāṁta bhikṣā va¨rtti Ayyavāru tama siṁ
hāsanānaku panilēkuṁḍā gaṇācāraṁ maṁniṁpacēsi mīru ce
muḍēśvarammaku nijamukomārlu varaprasādhakulu ganaka vibhūtiki
piṁpapanilēdu mīru sālevāru
lu mīru cadiviṁci dēvatā śāvaśēstunnāru ganaka cappaṁ
nā dēśālanu mīku vīri birudulu cellunu pramadhābhaktuluṁnnu
Avuduru yī vāru Avuduru māku mīkū tīrthamu
sālevārikaṁnnāmuṁddugā māku mānaṁgā
lālu ceṟapu mā

mānaṁ ceṁdeganaka dēśaṁlō mātōga
ṭakulaṁ ḍu gaṁgaravatana 1
kalekha yē¨rpāṭu cēsi mīku dharmaśāsanaṁ
nāraṁganaka mī vaṁśapāraṁparyataraṁ Ācaṁdrā
¨rkkasthāyigā Anubhaviṁcuka sukhāna vuṁḍēdi . yi
ṁduku mākulaṁlōvāru yavvaru yiyyakapō
yinā mākuladēvata camuṁḍēśvaraṁmma pādapadmāla
ku tappina vāḍamu ṁgamuniki tappinavāramu kā
śilō braṁhmahatyādi pātakamu cēsina pāpā
lavārumu yiṁduku sākṣulu sūryacaṁ
drulu yiṭani yiccina dharmaśāsanamu . śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 37.505 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
